summary: Completed frontend testing of simplified bingo system. All routing and UI elements work correctly, but Start Game functionality requires valid WebSocket connection.

integration_issues.issue: Start Game button disabled when WebSocket connection fails
integration_issues.root_cause: Button depends on roomHeaderData from WebSocket, which is null with invalid token
integration_issues.fix_priority: INFO - Expected behavior with invalid credentials

passed_tests: /login route without token shows 'Please login with a valid token'
/login/[token] route extracts and stores token in localStorage
/login with existing token in localStorage shows board selection
Board selection displays Active Game, Stake, Start in header correctly
Board buttons 1-100 are displayed and clickable
Board selection visual feedback works (green highlighting)
Board preview shows selected boards correctly
Token routing and authentication flow works as expected
action_item_for_main_agent: To test Start Game functionality, provide valid WebSocket credentials or implement mock data for testing. Current implementation correctly blocks functionality when WebSocket connection fails (403 error), which is the expected security behavior.

success_percentage.frontend: 87% - All UI components and routing work correctly. Start Game blocked due to authentication requirements.

should_main_agent_test_itself: true - Only need valid credentials for complete testing
